name: writhing_stalker.live_shadow_strike_mcw
description: Live writhing-stalker shadow/strike scene proof: install a harness-only vulnerable-midnight McWilliams fixture, guard saved midnight before spawn, spawn one hostile writhing stalker at seven east, turn safe mode off, require live monster-plan shadow-before-strike, strike, and immediate cooldown lines, then save/audit same-run active-monster state.

steps.label: post_load_stalker_shadow_strike_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: the harness-only vulnerable-midnight McWilliams live-debug fixture loads to the normal live map before the writhing stalker is spawned

steps.label: audit_saved_midnight_before_writhing_stalker_spawn
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove local midnight before the writhing-stalker shadow/strike spawn
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player turn metadata proves the fixture is at local midnight before spawning the writhing stalker; the fixture also applies player vulnerability state for this live opportunity scene

steps.label: debug_spawn_writhing_stalker_shadow_east
steps.preconditions: vulnerable-midnight dev-harness/McWilliams fixture is loaded and focused; debug spawn monster primitive starts from the main map screen
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug spawn monster helper returns to the live map after selecting writhing stalker and confirming a target tile seven squares east of the vulnerable player
steps.expected_immediate_state: one hostile mon_writhing_stalker should exist at plausible visible distance, not on top of the player
steps.failure_rule: debug menu wrong-screen, stale runtime, or missing later same-run shadow/strike artifact lines makes this row non-green

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_shadow_strike_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off after the writhing stalker spawn so the live turn window is not consumed by the safe-mode monster warning prompt

steps.label: advance_shadow_strike_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: a live turn window runs after the midnight vulnerable-player stalker spawn; feature proof depends on same-run writhing_stalker live_plan debug lines, not the screenshot alone
steps.failure_rule: if the artifact delta lacks shadow-before-strike, strike, and cooldown live_plan lines from the same turn window, this scene is inconclusive rather than green

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_shadow_strike_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain live writhing-stalker shadow-before-strike, strike, and cooldown lines
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves the live monster-plan seam shadowed outside focused view, struck when close enough, and then entered cooldown

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_writhing_stalker_shadow_strike_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after the shadow/strike live-plan window and before the save/writeback request

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_writhing_stalker_shadow_strike_window
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the writhing-stalker shadow/strike save
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the live-plan window; confirmation must not be sent before this prompt is proven

steps.label: confirm_save_after_writhing_stalker_shadow_strike_window
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: the proven case-sensitive save prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime gate can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_writhing_stalker_shadow_strike_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the writhing-stalker shadow/strike save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed writhing-stalker shadow/strike save, proving the following active_monsters audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_writhing_stalker_after_shadow_strike_scene
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain mon_writhing_stalker after same-run shadow/strike proof
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved active_monsters metadata contains the live writhing stalker after the shadow/strike window

evidence_contract.claim: a spawned writhing stalker reaches the live monster-plan seam at midnight, shadows outside focused view while the strike window is still distant, strikes the vulnerable player when close enough, and then cooldown blocks immediate relatching pressure
evidence_contract.setup_guard: the run uses harness-only game_turn and player_condition save transforms plus a saved-turn/time audit before spawn; it does not synthesize stalker state, map light, fields, or artificial lamps
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker live behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No shadow/strike live-scene credit if startup/load, saved midnight guard, debug-spawn footing, safe-mode-off live turn window, same-run shadow/strike/cooldown lines, save/writeback, and active-monster metadata are not all present and classified separately.
